title: pritzelago alpina subsp. dubia
intro: Pritzelago alpina subsp. dubia, also known as Dubious Wintercress, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pritzelago alpina subsp. dubia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dubious Wintercress typically involve infusions or tinctures made from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
